onboarding.subtitle: 3 steps to get connected
onboarding.warmup: For Veloseller to start computing TVelo, it needs daily records of your SKUs. Meaningful numbers after 7 days. The most accurate metrics after 30 days. We'll email you summary reports for those dates.
onboarding.step1.title: Connect a data source
onboarding.step1.desc: Google Sheet, Ozon or Wildberries API
onboarding.step2.title: First data records
onboarding.step2.desc: Syncing happens automatically after you connect
onboarding.step3.title: Wait for the recalculation
onboarding.step3.desc: Syncing runs every 6 hours, or click «Recalculate now» on the dashboard
onboarding.done: 🎉 Done! Veloseller is computing your sales velocity.
